# StarRiver Arts

> Public static site for StarRiver Arts — VR environment design, Taiwan landscape digital twins, and immersive exhibition spaces. Hosted on GitHub Pages.

## Primary sections

- [Studio](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/studio.html): creator portfolio and project index.
- [Play](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/): Project T mountain-road content hub. The Time Attack records station is live; other sections are in development.
- [Time Attack](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/): multi-page records station — tracks, players, vehicles, events.
- [Museum](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/museum/): exhibitions, web exhibitions, and interactive design-system showcases.

## Notes

- The site is trilingual: Traditional Chinese / English / Japanese.
- The Time Attack station uses shared HTML shells with query-string parameters while loading JSON data client-side.
